resources.string: The encryption key protecting your local data could not be read. This is often temporary — for example right after restoring a backup or updating Android. Try again first. If the problem persists, the only way to keep using the app is to erase all local data and start fresh.
This permanently deletes all chats, long-term memory, pipelines and presets stored on this device. This cannot be undone. Type %1$s to confirm.
